topic: Indian self-help groups to produce national flags for Independence Day
headline: DELHI GOVT TAPS SELF-HELP GROUPS TO PRODUCE 2 LAKH NATIONAL FLAGS FOR INDEPENDENCE DAY CELEBRATIONS
summary: The Delhi government has assigned self-help groups (SHGs) across the city to produce around two lakh national flags as part of the Har Ghar Tiranga 2026 campaign ahead of Independence Day. This initiative is led by the Chief Minister's Office and aims to promote the campaign. The SHGs will play a significant role in this effort, with eligible groups participating in the production of the national flags.
